summary: Backend testing for Partnership Activation feature - ALL 15 TESTS PASSED. All /api/partnership/* endpoints are working correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/partnership/status/{user_id} - Returns all step statuses correctly
✅ POST /api/partnership/convert-to-partner - Validates required steps (returns 400 when steps missing)
critical_code_review_comments: Partnership router correctly integrated in server.py at line 11900-11902
All 5 partnership steps validated: analisi_visualizzata, partnership_confermata, contratto_firmato, documenti_caricati, pagamento_verificato
Stripe checkout creates session for €2,790 with correct success/cancel URLs
Document upload supports 4 types: contratto_firmato, carta_identita, codice_fiscale, distinta_bonifico
convert-to-partner validates required steps before conversion
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user att2_1773352332@test.com with pagamento_analisi=true, call_stato=completata, analisi_generata=true
context_for_next_testing_agent: Partnership activation backend is fully functional. Test user has: analisi_visualizzata=true, partnership_confermata=true, contratto_firmato=true, documenti_caricati=false, pagamento_verificato=false. To complete conversion, user needs to: 1) Upload carta_identita and codice_fiscale, 2) Update documenti_caricati step, 3) Complete Stripe payment or upload distinta_bonifico, 4) Verify payment. Frontend route /attivazione-partnership should work when user is logged in.
